phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il binario per Brunate, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel bee-NAH-reeo per broo-NAH-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-dah eel bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un biglietto andata e ritorno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah oon bee-LYET-toh an-DAH-tah eh ree-TOR-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiude la funicolare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh lah foo-nee-koh-LAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare il posto in anticipo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh eel POS-toh een an-tee-CHEE-po, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si vede il lago dalla cima, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee see VEH-deh eel LAH-go DAHL-lah CHEE-mah pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, si vede bene il lago.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ SEE VEH-deh BEH-neh EEL LAH-goh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the lake is clearly visible.

responses.english: Yes, the lake is clearly visible.
responses.phonetic: SÌ SEE VEH-deh BEH-neh EEL LAH-goh
responses.french: Sì, si vede bene il lago.
